data.content: Review outcome: needs changes. The requested rollback migration is implemented in src/lib/memory-manager-commands.ts using 'kno rollback <id>', and focused tests pass in src/lib/__tests__/memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts and src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts. Approval is blocked because the required repo sanity gates fail for reasons outside this change: 'bunx tsc --noEmit' fails on unresolved conflict markers, and 'bun run build' fails on the same markers. Violations against acceptance for this review step: 1) required sanity gates do not pass, 2) repository parse state is broken in unrelated modified files including src/components/beat-columns.tsx, src/components/cascade-close-dialog.tsx, src/components/dep-tree.tsx, src/components/relationship-picker.tsx, src/components/retakes-view.tsx, and src/components/wave-planner.tsx.
